MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Siu Wan Tam Lam is present. Represented by the son, Wei Lam.
Attorney David Foran for the plaintiff.
Defendant Michelle Huang is present.
Attorney Paul Behrend appearing for defendant in full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JAN-06-2014 is vacated. (501/JPT)
